title: rbkhan007/ollamomui
summary: Full-stack AI gateway portfolio: FastAPI + Next.js + React Native + PySide6. 22 static routes, 4-pillar security (PBKDF2, SSRF, RBAC, audit), RAG pipeline, cross-platform desktop/mobile/web. Built to hire.

title: Mrdodo446/ModelForge
summary: Build and customize machine learning models efficiently with an open-source tool that supports macOS and Windows platforms.

title: Skeleratis/qwen-chat-ios
summary: Run Alibaba’s Qwen large language models locally on iOS for AI chat with image support, thought display, and model switching using Apple’s MLX framework.

title: aebconsulting/mesh-ai-bridge
summary: Meshtastic -> local LLM bridge for off-grid mesh networks: semantic RAG over an offline library, persistent memory, dashboard send API. Ask @ai over LoRa, answered on your own hardware.

title: Daywalker-Innovations/Synapse_DW
summary: Self-verifying multi-brain reasoning harness — route to the cheapest capable model, adversarially verify with a different brain family, execute code as evidence, learn from your own runs. Zero dependencies, one file.

title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows

title: BuggyBunny005/hse-ai-insight-platform
summary: Build and deploy a platform that analyzes data using AI to deliver actionable insights with scalable backend and frontend technologies.

title: kawaiirashi/llm-retry
summary: Provide retry logic and circuit breaker functionality for C++ applications to improve fault tolerance in LLM infrastructure.

title: wwx99921/llm-rank
summary: Rank passages using BM25 and large language models to improve retrieval accuracy within the llm-cpp toolkit.

title: expruff/asya-chat-ui
summary: Build multi-organization LLM chat platforms with model routing, tool execution, usage analytics, and OpenAI-compatible APIs.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: AntsAreRad/opti-oignon
summary: Local-first AI inference platform for LLMs — private chat, RAG, defense-in-depth security (Daily/Bulbe, encryption at rest, 2FA), on your own hardware. SvelteKit + FastAPI

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: Bboybo/canvo
summary: Run an AI agent with a data canvas and Linux sandbox on your Android phone for flexible, portable computing and development.

title: ducwuyy/DocSentinel
summary: Detect security risks in documents and questionnaires using automated analysis to ensure data safety and compliance.

title: elviscarvajall/xanaops
summary: Build a self-hosted intelligence dashboard that runs locally, protects your privacy, and improves with your use over time.

title: himalayass/claudex
summary: Launch Claude Code locally using Bun to run against OpenAI-compatible endpoints with flexible model and configuration options.

title: abubakerawad/ApexHunter
summary: Enable fast and automated threat hunting using agent-based methods powered by Python and large language models on Kali Linux.

title: CivicSuite/civicsuite
summary: Umbrella repo for the open-source CivicSuite municipal operations suite — charter, specs, roadmap, ADRs, governance, compatibility matrix. Code lives in sibling repos.

title: KavaSexGitHu/code-auditor
summary: Detect and analyze code plagiarism and similarities across languages using AI-powered forensic logic comparison and detailed PDF reporting.
